JURY TRIAL ON NOV-19-2007 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SIGNED AND ENTERED ON MONDAY, NOV-26-2007 IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF DIPAK PATEL AND AGAINST DEFENDANT MICHAEL BENNETT FOR THE AMOUNT OF $353.52 PRINCIPAL AND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 235 EDDY STREET, UNIT #45, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102. THE COURT ORDERS THE ACTUAL EVICTION STAYED UNTIL WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER-12-2007. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. JUDGE: HON. PAUL H. ALVARADO; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-002, 575 POLK STREET).
